2604.15210.title: Learning to Think Like a Cartoon Captionist: Incongruity-Resolution Supervision for Multimodal Humor Understanding
2604.15210.paper_summary: Humor is one of the few cognitive tasks where getting the reasoning right matters as much as getting the answer right. While recent work evaluates humor understanding on benchmarks such as the New Yorker Cartoon Caption Contest (NYCC), it largely treats it as black-box prediction, overlooking the structured reasoning processes underlying humor comprehension. We introduce IRS (Incongruity-Resolution Supervision), a framework that decomposes humor understanding into three components: incongruity modeling, which identifies mismatches in the visual scene; resolution modeling, which constructs coherent reinterpretations of these mismatches; and preference alignment, which evaluates candidate interpretations under human judgments. Grounded in incongruity-resolution theory and expert captionist practice, IRS supervises intermediate reasoning process through structured traces that make the path from visual perception to humorous interpretation explicit and learnable. Across 7B, 32B, and 72B models on NYCC, IRS outperforms strong open and closed multimodal baselines across caption matching and ranking tasks, with our largest model approaching expert-level performance on ranking. Zero-shot transfer to external benchmarks shows that IRS learns generalizable reasoning patterns. Our results suggest that supervising reasoning structure, rather than scale alone, is key for reasoning-centric tasks.
2604.15210.paper_summary_zh: 幽默是少數幾個認知任務之一，其中正確的推理與正確的答案同樣重要。儘管最近的研究在《紐約客》漫畫標題比賽（NYCC）等基準上評估幽默理解，但它在很大程度上將其視為黑箱預測，忽視了幽默理解背後的結構化推理過程。我們引入了IRS（不協調-解決監督），這是一個將幽默理解分解為三個組件的框架：不協調建模，識別視覺場景中的不匹配；解決建模，構建這些不匹配的連貫重新詮釋；以及偏好對齊，根據人類評判評估候選詮釋。IRS基於不協調-解決理論和專家標題創作的實踐，通過結構化的痕跡監督中間推理過程，明確且可學習地展示從視覺感知到幽默詮釋的過程。在NYCC上，針對7B、32B和72B模型，IRS在標題匹配和排名任務中超越了強大的開放和封閉多模態基準，我們最大的模型在排名上接近專家級表現。對外部基準的零樣本轉移顯示，IRS學習了可泛化的推理模式。我們的結果表明，監督推理結構，而非單純的規模，是推理中心任務的關鍵。
2604.15210.author: Hatice Merve Vural et.al.
2604.15210.authors: Hatice Merve Vural, Doga Kukul, Ege Erdem Ozlu, Demir Ekin Arikan, Bob Mankoff, Erkut Erdem, Aykut Erdem
